summary: 2026-06-08 22:21:13 PDT — Reviewed `git diff 5f0fcd0...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 5f0fcd0..HEAD`, and `reviews/overlay-teardown-diagnostics.md`. The two approved IMPORTANT fixes are correctly resolved in the product code and tests, but the delta adds one out-of-scope review artifact. I attempted the targeted Vitest file, but this read-only sandbox blocked Vite's temp config write with `EPERM`.

findings.title: Out-of-scope Codex review artifact committed
findings.claim: The re-review delta adds a generated `.codex.json` review output file. AC8's scope-containment list allows the story markdown file, not a sibling Codex JSON artifact, so the branch now contains an extra file outside the approved scope.
findings.suggestion: Remove `reviews/overlay-teardown-diagnostics.codex.json` from the branch, or explicitly update the story's scope list if Thomas wants this artifact tracked.
